title: Criminal Procedure and Evidence: Subsidiary Legislation
title_en: Criminal Procedure and Evidence: Subsidiary Legislation

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Tariff of Allowances (Witnesses in Criminal Cases) Regulations.

provisions.title: Definition
provisions.content:
2. Definition
In these Regulations, "the Registrar" means the Registrar of the High Court.

provisions.title: Subsistence allowance

definitions.definition: the Registrar of the High Court.
